simple_types.name: INTENCLR_DATARDY_Field
simple_types.code:
type INTENCLR_DATARDY_Field is
   Disabled,
   Enabled)
  with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: INTENCLR_DATARDY_Field_1
simple_types.code:
type INTENCLR_DATARDY_Field_1 is
   Intenclr_Datardy_Field_Reset,
   Clear)
  with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: INTENSET_DATARDY_Field
simple_types.code:
type INTENSET_DATARDY_Field is
   Disabled,
   Enabled)
  with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: INTENSET_DATARDY_Field_1
simple_types.code:
type INTENSET_DATARDY_Field_1 is
   Intenset_Datardy_Field_Reset,
   Set)
  with Size => 1;
